mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Project (project_name, building_id, start_date, estimated_finish_date, project_lead_id, status, completion_date) VALUES (#{projectName}, #{buildingId}, #{startDate}, #{estimatedFinishDate}, #{projectLeadId}, #{status}, #{completionDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE Project SET project_name = #{projectName}, building_id = #{buildingId}, start_date = #{startDate}, estimated_finish_date = #{estimatedFinishDate}, project_lead_id = #{projectLeadId}, status = #{status}, completion_date = #{completionDate} WHERE id = #{id}
